python-for-beginners.title: Python for Beginners
python-for-beginners.description: A practical beginner Python course from first program through functions, files, classes, testing, and a capstone project.
python-for-beginners.moreComingSoon: More Python for Beginners lessons are coming soon.

python-3.title: Conditions and Logic
python-3.description: Help learners make programs choose different paths using comparisons and conditionals.
outcomes: Write if, elif, and else blocks
why: Builds confidence with conditions and logic.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-3-core-building-blocks.title: Combining Conditions
python-3-core-building-blocks.description: Learn and, or, and not, truthiness and empty values, guard clauses for cleaner logic through focused examples and practice.
